New Prints

Brain Affairs

€310,00

— OR —

This ai art is signed by Art Supreme. It is made on canvas and it comes with the original Certificate of Authenticity.

SKU: NP-73253-22 Category: Style Transfer Tag: Style Transfer
Share:
  • Description
  • Additional information
  • Reviews (0)

Brain Affairs demonstrates how life extends beyond its own subjective limits and often tells a story about the effects of global cultural interaction. It challenges the binaries we continually reconstruct between Self and Other, between our own ‘cannibal’ and ‘civilized’ selves.

Weight:

0.3
Material:

Paper, found materials.
Condition:

Shipped in glass frame

About us

We are a family of creators – close knit and a little crazy – providing the world’s most exclusive art form from our headquarters in Berlin, Germany. We provide beautiful AI artworks because we believe each one is a representation of the pivotal turning point for the art market and art history.

Handcrafted with love © 2024 All rights reserved.
